requirement_topic.en: Ethiopia EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024 — Charging Infrastructure Mandate and IEC 61851 Modes
requirement_topic.zh: 埃塞俄比亚 EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 号——充电基础设施强制要求与 IEC 61851 充电模式
requirement_topic.zht: 衣索比亞 EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 號——充電基礎設施強制要求與 IEC 61851 充電模式

summary.en: The Ethiopian Petroleum and Energy Authority issued EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024 in December 2024, establishing a comprehensive legal framework for electric vehicle charging infrastructure in Ethiopia. The directive requires EV importers and assemblers to establish charging stations as a mandatory market-entry condition. Fast-charging stations must be available every 50 km (approximately 31 miles), and heavy-vehicle charging points every 120 km (approximately 75 miles). The directive references IEC 61851 for EV charging modes, specifying that charging shall comply with the four conductive charging modes defined in IEC 61851. Importers of EV chargers must provide internationally recognised battery safety and charger safety certifications. All EV chargers deployed in Ethiopia should be configured for the Ethiopian grid: 220 V single-phase or 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚石油和能源局于 2024 年 12 月发布 EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 号，为埃塞俄比亚电动汽车充电基础设施建立了全面的法律框架。该指令要求电动汽车进口商和组装商将建立充电站作为强制性市场准入条件。快充站须每 50 公里（约 31 英里）布设一处，重型车辆充电点须每 120 公里（约 75 英里）布设一处。该指令援引 IEC 61851 规定充电模式，明确充电须符合 IEC 61851 定义的四种传导充电模式。电动汽车充电设备进口商须提供国际公认的电池安全和充电器安全认证。在埃塞俄比亚部署的所有电动汽车充电设备应按埃塞俄比亚电网配置：单相 220 V 或三相 380 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞石油和能源局於 2024 年 12 月發布 EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 號，為衣索比亞電動汽車充電基礎設施建立了全面的法律框架。該指令要求電動汽車進口商和組裝商將建立充電站作為強制性市場準入條件。快充站須每 50 公里（約 31 英里）布設一處，重型車輛充電點須每 120 公里（約 75 英里）布設一處。該指令援引 IEC 61851 規定充電模式，明確充電須符合 IEC 61851 定義的四種傳導充電模式。電動汽車充電設備進口商須提供國際公認的電池安全和充電器安全認證。在衣索比亞部署的所有電動汽車充電設備應按衣索比亞電網配置：單相 220 V 或三相 380 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024 — Directive Issued to Determine Electric Vehicle Charging System (Ethiopian Petroleum and Energy Authority)
IEC 61851 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system (four charging modes referenced in the Directive)
Ethiopian Energy Proclamation 810/2013 and Energy Operations Regulation 447/2018 (EEU grid framework)

summary.en: China's EV charger safety and charging-mode standard is GB/T 18487, which corresponds broadly to IEC 61851 but differs in connector interface, communication protocol (GB/T 27930 CAN-based vs IEC 61851 pilot signal), and some safety parameters. A charger built and certified solely to GB/T 18487 cannot be assumed to satisfy IEC 61851 mode requirements without technical review and, where needed, re-testing or adaptation.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备安全和充电模式标准为 GB/T 18487，与 IEC 61851 大体对应，但在接口、通信协议（GB/T 27930 基于 CAN 对比 IEC 61851 导引信号）和部分安全参数方面存在差异。仅依据 GB/T 18487 制造和认证的充电设备，不能未经技术审查（必要时进行重新测试或适配）即假定其满足 IEC 61851 充电模式要求。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備安全和充電模式標準為 GB/T 18487，與 IEC 61851 大體對應，但在接口、通信協議（GB/T 27930 基於 CAN 對比 IEC 61851 導引信號）和部分安全參數方面存在差異。僅依據 GB/T 18487 製造和認證的充電設備，不能未經技術審查（必要時進行重新測試或適配）即假定其滿足 IEC 61851 充電模式要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
GB/T 27930 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicle
GB/T 20234 series — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles

gap.en: Confirm that the charger model is configured for IEC 61851 charging modes as required by EVCS Directive 1034/2024. Obtain IEC 61851 compliance evidence (test report or certificate) from an accredited body. Verify voltage and frequency settings match Ethiopia 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase or 380 V / 50 Hz three-phase as applicable. If the product was tested only to GB/T 18487, assess the scope differences and arrange supplementary IEC 61851 testing before deployment.
gap.zh: 确认充电设备型号已按 EVCS 指令 1034/2024 要求配置 IEC 61851 充电模式。从认可机构获取 IEC 61851 符合性证据（测试报告或证书）。核实电压和频率参数符合埃塞俄比亚适用的单相 220 V / 50 Hz 或三相 380 V / 50 Hz。如产品仅按 GB/T 18487 测试，应评估范围差异，并在部署前安排补充 IEC 61851 测试。
gap.zht: 確認充電設備型號已按 EVCS 指令 1034/2024 要求配置 IEC 61851 充電模式。從認可機構獲取 IEC 61851 符合性證據（測試報告或證書）。核實電壓和頻率參數符合衣索比亞適用的單相 220 V / 50 Hz 或三相 380 V / 50 Hz。如產品僅按 GB/T 18487 測試，應評估範圍差異，並在部署前安排補充 IEC 61851 測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024 for EV chargers deployed in Ethiopia; EV importers and assemblers must establish compliant charging infrastructure as a market-entry condition
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 is mandatory in China; IEC 61851 compliance is required for Ethiopia market under Directive 1034/2024

source.publisher: Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia Ministry of Justice — EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024 mandates IEC 61851 charging modes for Ethiopia. Chinese chargers certified only to GB/T 18487 require technical review and may need supplementary IEC 61851 testing before deployment. Configure for 220 V / 380 V, 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 号规定埃塞俄比亚须采用 IEC 61851 充电模式。仅按 GB/T 18487 认证的中国充电设备，在部署前需进行技术审查，可能须进行补充 IEC 61851 测试。应配置为 220 V / 380 V、50 Hz。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 號規定衣索比亞須採用 IEC 61851 充電模式。僅按 GB/T 18487 認證的中國充電設備，在部署前需進行技術審查，可能須進行補充 IEC 61851 測試。應配置為 220 V / 380 V、50 Hz。

requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability Gap: GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 in the Ethiopian EV Market
requirement_topic.zh: 充电接口互操作性差距：埃塞俄比亚电动汽车市场中的 GB/T 20234 对比 IEC 62196
requirement_topic.zht: 充電接口互操作性差距：衣索比亞電動汽車市場中的 GB/T 20234 對比 IEC 62196

summary.en: Ethiopia's vehicle fleet is diversifying rapidly following the January 2024 ban on ICE vehicle imports and growing EV adoption. EVs entering Ethiopia from multiple origins carry different connector standards: European-standard EVs use IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC); Chinese-standard EVs use GB/T 20234.2 (AC) and GB/T 20234.3 (DC). The GB/T 20234 and IEC 62196 connectors are physically and electrically incompatible without an adapter. A Chinese charger with only GB/T 20234 sockets will not charge IEC 62196-type vehicles, and vice versa. Exporters of Chinese EV charging infrastructure to Ethiopia must assess the intended vehicle fleet composition and provide multi-standard connectors or confirm connector compatibility with the deployment context.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚于 2024 年 1 月起禁止进口燃油车，随着电动汽车普及率不断提升，车队构成迅速多元化。进入埃塞俄比亚的电动汽车来源多样，搭载不同的充电接口标准：欧洲标准电动汽车采用 IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和 CCS2（直流）；中国标准电动汽车采用 GB/T 20234.2（交流）和 GB/T 20234.3（直流）。GB/T 20234 和 IEC 62196 接口在无转换接头的情况下物理和电气上不兼容。仅配备 GB/T 20234 插座的中国充电设备无法为 IEC 62196 型电动汽车充电，反之亦然。向埃塞俄比亚出口中国电动汽车充电基础设施的出口商，必须评估目标车队构成，并提供多标准接口或确认接口与部署场景的兼容性。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞於 2024 年 1 月起禁止進口燃油車，隨著電動汽車普及率不斷提升，車隊構成迅速多元化。進入衣索比亞的電動汽車來源多樣，搭載不同的充電接口標準：歐洲標準電動汽車採用 IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和 CCS2（直流）；中國標準電動汽車採用 GB/T 20234.2（交流）和 GB/T 20234.3（直流）。GB/T 20234 和 IEC 62196 接口在無轉換接頭的情況下物理和電氣上不相容。僅配備 GB/T 20234 插座的中國充電設備無法為 IEC 62196 型電動汽車充電，反之亦然。向衣索比亞出口中國電動汽車充電基礎設施的出口商，必須評估目標車隊構成，並提供多標準接口或確認接口與部署場景的相容性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — Conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for AC pin and contact-tube accessories
GB/T 20234.2 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024 (connector type requirements — verify current text with Ethiopian Petroleum and Energy Authority)

summary.en: Chinese EV chargers manufactured for the domestic market use GB/T 20234.2 (AC Type 2 equivalent with a different pin layout) and GB/T 20234.3 (DC, different from CCS2). These connectors are incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2 without an adapter. Chinese manufacturers who produce multi-standard chargers with both GB/T 20234 and IEC 62196 / CCS2 outlets can address the Ethiopia interoperability requirement.
summary.zh: 面向中国国内市场制造的中国电动汽车充电设备采用 GB/T 20234.2（交流，与 Type 2 等效但引脚布局不同）和 GB/T 20234.3（直流，与 CCS2 不同）。这些接口在无转换接头的情况下与 IEC 62196 Type 2 和 CCS2 不兼容。生产同时配备 GB/T 20234 和 IEC 62196 / CCS2 插座的多标准充电设备的中国制造商，可满足埃塞俄比亚互操作性要求。
summary.zht: 面向中國國內市場製造的中國電動汽車充電設備採用 GB/T 20234.2（交流，與 Type 2 等效但引腳佈局不同）和 GB/T 20234.3（直流，與 CCS2 不同）。這些接口在無轉換接頭的情況下與 IEC 62196 Type 2 和 CCS2 不相容。生產同時配備 GB/T 20234 和 IEC 62196 / CCS2 插座的多標準充電設備的中國製造商，可滿足衣索比亞互操作性要求。

gap.en: Assess the Ethiopia deployment site's vehicle fleet. If non-Chinese EVs (IEC 62196 / CCS2) are present or expected, the charger must provide compatible outlet types. Specify chargers with IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2 outlets, or dual-standard units. Confirm the connector type requirements of EVCS Directive 1034/2024 with the Petroleum and Energy Authority before finalising the equipment specification.
gap.zh: 评估埃塞俄比亚部署场地的车队构成。如现有或预期存在非中国电动汽车（IEC 62196 / CCS2），充电设备须提供兼容的插座类型。应指定配备 IEC 62196 Type 2 和 CCS2 插座或双标准插座的充电设备。在最终确定设备规格前，向石油和能源局确认 EVCS 指令 1034/2024 的接口类型要求。
gap.zht: 評估衣索比亞部署場地的車隊構成。如現有或預期存在非中國電動汽車（IEC 62196 / CCS2），充電設備須提供相容的插座類型。應指定配備 IEC 62196 Type 2 和 CCS2 插座或雙標準插座的充電設備。在最終確定設備規格前，向石油和能源局確認 EVCS 指令 1034/2024 的接口類型要求。

mandatory_status.target: Connector type requirements governed by EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024; specific mandatory connector types should be confirmed with the Ethiopian Petroleum and Energy Authority
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is mandatory in China for domestic charging; IEC 62196 compatibility is a market and regulatory requirement for the Ethiopia deployment context

source.publisher: EV24.africa — Ethiopia's EV Import Regulations: Key Changes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The GB/T 20234 and IEC 62196 connector families are physically incompatible. Ethiopian EV market diversification means GB/T-only chargers will not serve all vehicles. Specify multi-standard or IEC 62196-compatible chargers, and confirm connector requirements with the Petroleum and Energy Authority under Directive 1034/2024.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 20234 与 IEC 62196 接口族在物理上不兼容。埃塞俄比亚电动汽车市场多元化意味着仅支持 GB/T 的充电设备无法为所有车辆充电。应指定多标准或兼容 IEC 62196 的充电设备，并依据指令 1034/2024 向石油和能源局确认接口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 20234 與 IEC 62196 接口族在物理上不相容。衣索比亞電動汽車市場多元化意味著僅支援 GB/T 的充電設備無法為所有車輛充電。應指定多標準或相容 IEC 62196 的充電設備，並依據指令 1034/2024 向石油和能源局確認接口要求。

requirement_topic.en: Ethiopia EV Import Policy and Market Context for Charger Exporters
requirement_topic.zh: 充电设备出口商视角下的埃塞俄比亚电动汽车进口政策与市场背景
requirement_topic.zht: 充電設備出口商視角下的衣索比亞電動汽車進口政策與市場背景

summary.en: Ethiopia became the first country to ban ICE vehicle imports effective January 2024, creating a structurally EV-only new vehicle import market. As of May 2025, the ban was extended to SKD and CKD ICE vehicle kits. Fully assembled EVs face a 15% import duty; SKD EV kits face 5%; locally assembled EV parts face near-zero tariffs. Importers and assemblers of EVs must establish EV charging stations as a condition of market entry under EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024. This policy creates a mandatory supply-side requirement for EV charger infrastructure. Charger exporters from China targeting Ethiopia should note: (1) the fast-growing captive demand from mandatory EV-importer charging obligations; (2) the connector and standard compatibility requirements; and (3) that international battery safety certifications are required for imported charger-battery combinations.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚自 2024 年 1 月起成为全球首个禁止进口燃油车的国家，形成了结构性的纯电动新车进口市场。至 2025 年 5 月，禁令已延伸至 SKD 和 CKD 燃油车套件。完整组装的电动汽车须缴纳 15% 进口税；SKD 电动汽车套件须缴纳 5%；本地组装电动汽车零部件则享受近零税率。依据 EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 号，电动汽车进口商和组装商须将建立充电站作为市场准入条件。该政策为电动汽车充电基础设施创造了强制性的供给侧需求。面向埃塞俄比亚市场的中国充电设备出口商应注意：（1）源于强制性电动汽车进口商充电义务的快速增长的锁定需求；（2）接口和标准兼容性要求；（3）进口充电设备与电池组合须持有国际公认的电池安全认证。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞自 2024 年 1 月起成為全球首個禁止進口燃油車的國家，形成了結構性的純電動新車進口市場。至 2025 年 5 月，禁令已延伸至 SKD 和 CKD 燃油車套件。完整組裝的電動汽車須繳納 15% 進口稅；SKD 電動汽車套件須繳納 5%；本地組裝電動汽車零部件則享受近零稅率。依據 EVCS 指令第 1034/2024 號，電動汽車進口商和組裝商須將建立充電站作為市場準入條件。該政策為電動汽車充電基礎設施創造了強制性的供給側需求。面向衣索比亞市場的中國充電設備出口商應注意：（1）源於強制性電動汽車進口商充電義務的快速成長的鎖定需求；（2）接口和標準相容性要求；（3）進口充電設備與電池組合須持有國際公認的電池安全認證。

standards_or_laws: EVCS Directive No. 1034/2024 (mandatory charging infrastructure as market-entry condition for EV importers)
Ethiopia ICE vehicle import ban (effective January 2024, extended to SKD/CKD May 2025)
Ethiopia EV import duty schedule: 15% fully assembled EVs, 5% SKD EV kits

summary.en: China does not have an equivalent ICE import ban. Chinese EV charger manufacturers face different domestic market drivers. For export to Ethiopia, the mandatory charging infrastructure policy under Directive 1034/2024 creates structurally guaranteed demand — but only for chargers that meet IEC 61851 mode requirements and connector compatibility with the deployed Ethiopian EV fleet.
summary.zh: 中国没有类似的燃油车进口禁令。中国电动汽车充电设备制造商面临不同的国内市场驱动因素。对于出口至埃塞俄比亚，指令 1034/2024 下的强制充电基础设施政策创造了结构性有保障的需求——但仅限于满足 IEC 61851 充电模式要求且与已部署埃塞俄比亚电动汽车车队具有接口兼容性的充电设备。
summary.zht: 中國沒有類似的燃油車進口禁令。中國電動汽車充電設備製造商面臨不同的國內市場驅動因素。對於出口至衣索比亞，指令 1034/2024 下的強制充電基礎設施政策創造了結構性有保障的需求——但僅限於滿足 IEC 61851 充電模式要求且與已部署衣索比亞電動汽車車隊具有接口相容性的充電設備。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487 (Chinese domestic EV charger standard — baseline reference only for Ethiopia market)

gap.en: Charger exporters targeting the Ethiopian mandatory EV infrastructure market should: confirm IEC 61851 compliance; confirm connector compatibility with the Ethiopian EV fleet mix; verify EVCS Directive 1034/2024 requirements with the Petroleum and Energy Authority; confirm whether ECAE PVoC covers their charger product category; and ensure grid settings match 220 V / 50 Hz Ethiopia specifications.
gap.zh: 面向埃塞俄比亚强制电动汽车基础设施市场的充电设备出口商应：确认 IEC 61851 合规性；确认接口与埃塞俄比亚电动汽车车队构成的兼容性；向石油和能源局核实 EVCS 指令 1034/2024 要求；确认 ECAE PVoC 是否覆盖其充电设备产品类别；并确保电网参数符合埃塞俄比亚 220 V / 50 Hz 规格。
gap.zht: 面向衣索比亞強制電動汽車基礎設施市場的充電設備出口商應：確認 IEC 61851 合規性；確認接口與衣索比亞電動汽車車隊構成的相容性；向石油和能源局核實 EVCS 指令 1034/2024 要求；確認 ECAE PVoC 是否覆蓋其充電設備產品類別；並確保電網參數符合衣索比亞 220 V / 50 Hz 規格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: EV importers and assemblers must establish charging stations under Directive 1034/2024 as a market-entry condition; creates structural demand for compliant charger infrastructure
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent ICE ban or mandatory charging infrastructure obligation in China; Ethiopia policy is market-specific

source.publisher: Further Africa — Ethiopia Drives Towards Electric Mobility: EV Charging Stations Now Mandatory

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopia's ICE import ban and Directive 1034/2024 create mandatory demand for EV charging infrastructure. Chinese charger exporters should verify IEC 61851 compliance, connector interoperability with the Ethiopian fleet, and ECAE PVoC scope before entering this market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚的燃油车进口禁令和指令 1034/2024 为电动汽车充电基础设施创造了强制性需求。中国充电设备出口商在进入该市场前，应核实 IEC 61851 合规性、与埃塞俄比亚车队的接口互操作性，以及 ECAE PVoC 覆盖范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞的燃油車進口禁令和指令 1034/2024 為電動汽車充電基礎設施創造了強制性需求。中國充電設備出口商在進入該市場前，應核實 IEC 61851 合規性、與衣索比亞車隊的接口互操作性，以及 ECAE PVoC 覆蓋範圍。
